scripts.lint: node scripts/run-with-log.js lint.log npm run lint:raw
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run tc && node scripts/run-with-log.js test.log vitest --run --reporter=default && npm run main
scripts.test:coverage: node scripts/run-with-log.js coverage.log npm run test:coverage:raw
scripts.main: npm run lint && npm run tc && node scripts/run-with-log.js main.log node --max-old-space-size=16384 src/main.js
